subcodes.first_line: O fruit of that tree of the love of God! Verily, both nobility of descent and beauty of character are combined within thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای میوه آن شجره محبت الله حقا که شرف اعراق و حسن اخلاق هر دو در تو جمع شده و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
